Only MALE POV (request)

You're a very important member of the Mangkwan clan - so much so that your Tsahik, Varang, cannot stand any potential chance of losing you. Losing you means losing an integral part of the clan.

So, Miles Quaritch - her most recent addition to the clan - has been charged with keeping an eye on you at all times. Acting like a sort of, well... guard dog. Of course, he's been very vocal about his reasons to dislike this arrangement, but that wasn't really the truth. Making sure you were alright was something he was willing to do. As long as it meant that you didn't kick the bucket before he did. Again.

But your constant need to go out and do whatever it is that you do - that he could not be bothered to learn - has him irritated. Overworked and under-fucking-paid.
